item.title: Lisdo 0.1.1
item.description:
### Lisdo v0.1.1 macOS beta.
This beta refreshes Lisdo's Mac experience around a calmer native shell and adds the updater foundation for future releases.
- Added Sparkle 2 auto-update support. If you installed Lisdo v0.1.0 or the earlier v0.1.1 build, download and install this DMG manually once. After that, future macOS updates can be checked and installed inside Lisdo. - Updated the release pipeline to sign Sparkle appcasts and publish the hosted appcast through the existing Cloudflare Pages website deployment. - Rebuilt the Mac shell around native `NavigationSplitView`, sidebar selection, and `navigationTitle`. - Reworked the top-right controls into separate circular Search, Filters, Quick Capture, and Settings buttons. - Added a close button to the expanded search bar so it can collapse back to the circular search button. - Added red `Overdue` tags for active todos past their due or scheduled time. - Added yellow timing tags for active due or scheduled todos coming up within three days. - Kept action styling monochrome, including gray sidebar selection and non-blue processing actions. - Reduced focus-ring artifacts across toolbar, filter, capture, inbox, and menu bar controls. - Added a bottom Quit action to the menu bar extra.
AI output remains draft-first. Review and save a draft before it becomes a todo. Provider secrets remain in Keychain or local Mac settings and are not written to CloudKit records.
Download the DMG asset from this release, open it, and drag Lisdo to Applications.
----------
这个 beta 版本继续打磨 Lisdo 的 Mac 原生体验，并加入之后版本所需的 app 内更新基础。
- 新增 Sparkle 2 自动更新支持。如果你安装的是 Lisdo v0.1.0 或之前已经发布过的 v0.1.1，需要手动下载并安装这次 DMG 一次。之后的 macOS 更新就可以在 Lisdo 里面检查和安装。 - release pipeline 现在会签名 Sparkle appcast，并继续通过现有 Cloudflare Pages 网站部署发布 hosted appcast。 - Mac 主窗口改为基于原生 `NavigationSplitView`、sidebar selection 和 `navigationTitle` 的结构。 - 顶部右侧工具栏改为独立圆形按钮：Search、Filters、Quick Capture、Settings。 - 展开的 search bar 右侧新增关闭按钮，可以退回圆形搜索按钮。 - active todo 如果 due 或 scheduled 时间已经过去，会显示红色 `Overdue` tag。 - active todo 如果 due 或 scheduled 时间在三天内，会显示黄色倒计时 tag。 - 操作样式继续保持单色，包括灰色 sidebar selection 和非蓝色 processing actions。 - 减少 toolbar、filter、capture、inbox 和 menu bar 控件上的 focus ring 残留。 - 菜单栏面板底部新增 Quit Lisdo。
AI 输出始终先进入 draft。用户审核并保存后，draft 才会变成正式 todo。Provider secrets 根据类型保存在 Keychain 或本机设置中，不写入 CloudKit records。
下载本 release 中的 DMG 文件，打开后把 Lisdo 拖到 Applications 即可安装。
